summary: Iteration 35 - AI Chat with Full Workflow Context & Info Sheet PDF Export. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working. AI Chat returns step names, document counts, expiry alerts. Info Sheet PDF export returns 135KB branded PDF with logo.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Chat endpoint at /api/ai-intel/chat correctly fetches full workflow context: case_steps, documents (counts + expiry), information_sheets, sales (payment status)
AI response includes actual step names (Profile Creation, IELTS Preparation), document counts (19 uploaded, 5 approved, 13 pending), and expiry alerts
Chat session persistence works correctly - session_id is preserved across messages
Info Sheet PDF export at /api/reports/export/info-sheet/{case_id} returns 135KB PDF with LEAMSS logo
PDF generation uses reportlab with Image for logo, includes all 6 sections: Personal Details, Family Chart, Dependent Children, Migrating Dependents, Qualifications, Employment History
InfoSheetEditor component shows Export PDF button next to Upload Resume and Save All Changes
Repeatable sections (Qualifications, Employment) correctly show all 6 entries with no upper limit
Add Qualification and Add Employment buttons always visible
seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: 6 qualifications and 6 employment entries in client's info sheet
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 tested P1 (AI Chat with workflow context) and P2 (Info Sheet PDF export). ALL PASSED: (1) POST /api/ai-intel/chat - AI responds with specific case step info (Profile Creation, IELTS Preparation), document counts (19 uploaded, 5 approved, 13 pending), and expiry alerts (IELTS expired, Medical expiring in 14 days), (2) Chat session persists with session_id across messages, (3) GET /api/reports/export/info-sheet/{case_id} - Returns 135KB PDF with LEAMSS logo and all 6 sections, (4) Frontend My Info tab shows Export PDF button, Upload Resume button, Save All Changes button, (5) All 6 collapsible sections visible and expandable, (6) Qualifications section shows 6 entries with Add Qualification button always visible, (7) Employment section shows 6 entries with Add Employment button always visible. Client case_id: cb09cf65-9a0c-47c6-8585-bace5da8c221.
